violations.text: Multiple prepared foods and sauces were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2025
A trap was observed with a deceased rodent. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2025
The granite counters at the deli service were observed with several deep cracks. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -can opener and base -deli service counters (in cracks) -under prep unit hood -chest freezer gaskets. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025
Utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/01/2024

The cutting boards in the deli area and sauce prep area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/01/2024
Black marble counter located by the cheese deli area was not in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/01/2024
Gaskets at sauce reach-in was not in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/01/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the fanguards of sauce reach-in and walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the basement warewashing area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 03/01/2024
